content:
Sword of Jehovah, swing

title: Fare Thee Well, O Love Of Woman!
content:
Fare thee well, O Love of Woman!

    Holds me by a magic spell.

title: The Dying Soldier To The Nightingale.
content:
I plead with tears to thee,
    Sweet warbler of the shade,
    Breathe not such strains to me,
    The sweetest ever made.

title: The American Girl.
content:
The maid for man to love,
    All other forms above,
    Is she whose home adorns the loam of this fair land of mine:

title: Home! Home!
content:
Home! Home!

content:

content:

title: The Young Vets.

title: The British Gyp.

content:

content:

title: The Union Oath.
content:

title: The American Girls.
content:
